subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the Voice that proclaimeth through all things: "Verily, there is none other God but Me, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ان استمع ندآء من ینطق فی کل شیء انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الوهاب
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
